title: GameSync Plugin
description: A GameSync community plugin. One .json file per plugin; the filename stem is the plugin id. games/emulators are pure data and always safe. viewers and hooks run arbitrary shell commands and only execute when the user enables 'allow plugins to run commands' in GameSync.

$schema.description: Optional pointer to this schema for editor autocompletion.

name.description: Optional display name for the plugin.

games.description: Map of Steam appid (string) to a save-path rule.

emulators.description: Map of emulator key (string) to a save-path rule. 'name' is required for emulators.

hooks.description: Shell commands run around backup/restore. RUNS SHELL COMMANDS.

pathTemplate.description: An ordered save-path template. The first path that resolves AND exists on disk wins. Allowed placeholders: {APPDATA} {LOCALAPPDATA} {DOCUMENTS} {SAVEDGAMES} {HOME} {USERPROFILE} {APPSUPPORT} {XDG_DATA} {XDG_CONFIG} {INSTALL_DIR}. Use forward slashes.

name.description: Display name. Also lets non-Steam stores (GOG/Epic) match by normalized name.

command.description: Shell command with {file} substituted for the matched file.

hookCommand.description: Shell command, or null to disable this hook.
